description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a matte black bezel. The front features a clear, high-resolution screen displaying a Windows desktop interface, suggesting it is powered on. The bezel is moderately thick and angular, giving the monitor a robust and contemporary appearance. The rear of the monitor is characterized by a geometric, faceted back panel with a vent and a square access panel, as well as a sturdy, V-shaped stand that provides stable support. The stand is made of black plastic or metal and is designed to keep the monitor upright on a flat surface. No visible buttons, ports, or brand logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen computer monitor with a matte black bezel and a sturdy V-shaped stand. The display is wide and clear, with a faceted rear panel and no visible buttons or logos.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the monitor's slim depth and the angular, V-shaped stand extending backward for stability.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the wide, clear display framed by a matte black bezel, with the screen powered on and no visible buttons or logos.
description_view_2: Another side profile, mirroring view 0, highlighting the monitor's thinness and the geometric design of the stand.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the faceted back panel, a vent, a square access panel, and the full V-shaped stand, with no visible ports or branding.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is matte black, moderately thick, and angular with sharp corners, providing a robust frame around the display. It has a uniform color and texture with no decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a V-shaped pedestal made of black plastic or metal, with two wide legs extending forward and backward for stability. It appears solid and non-adjustable, designed for desktop placement.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
